'''Blob candy''' was a sweet candy made on [[Umgul/Legends|Umgul]].

==Behind the scenes==
It came in three types: An experimental flavor, which had 66% flavor and 33% nutritional value; an experimental nutritional value, which had an overall quality of 33% and a potential energy of 66%; and an experimental quantity, which had a 75% potential energy and 25% decay resistance.

{{Food-stub}}
